title: Section 6
content: The 1[Authorised Officer] of 2[a Government Savings Bank] may take such security as he thinks necessary from any person 3[to whom he pays any money under sub-section (4) of section 4A] for the due administration of the money so paid, and he may assign the said security to any person interested in such administration.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 13 of 2018, s. 116, for "Secretary" (w.e.f. 1-4-2018). 2. Subs. by s. 122, ibid., for certain words (w.e.f. 1-4-2018). 3. Subs. by Act 45 of 1959, s. 5, for "to whom he pays any money under section 4".
